runway_notes.14:
RWY 14 - left-hand pattern (Standard).
Used for arrival/departure up to 5 kts tailwind; otherwise City-Circling for RWY 32.
Report intended routing on first contact with TWR (e.g. 'Route WHISKEY').
Pattern entry: from VRP, fly to E1/Z1/S1/W1 abeam pattern leg (topographic, not in nav DB).
Elev 1673 ft; pattern altitude 2673 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Avoid TMA BERN 1+2 (FL100 / 5000 ft); CTR BERN max 4500 ft.
runway_notes.32:
RWY 32 - right-hand pattern (City Circling).
Used when RWY 14 tailwind > 5 kts.
Report intended routing on first contact with TWR (e.g. 'Route WHISKEY').
Elev 1673 ft; pattern altitude 2673 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Avoid TMA BERN 1+2 (FL100 / 5000 ft); CTR BERN max 4500 ft.

metadata.source: AIP Switzerland LSZB AD 2 (20 FEB 2025); IVAO VAC LSZB (JUL 2022); Navigraph earth_fix.dat for VRP coordinates
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; pattern_direction (14=left, 32=right) is a plausible inference (City Circling implies right pattern for RWY 32) — verify against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: Hauptpunkte N/E/Z/S/W taken from Navigraph earth_fix.dat (official VPxxx fixes for LSZB). HE/HW (helicopter sectors) from VAC (WIL R220/D2, FRI R053/D11.9). The _1-pendants (E1/Z1/S1/W1) of the published routes (NOVEMBER N→E1, ECHO E→E1, ZULU Z→Z1, SIERRA S→S1, WHISKEY W→W1) are topographic pattern-entry points not registered in any navaid database; the plugin omits them and lets build_procedure compute DW-BEG directly from the main VRP. Real-world pilot must hand-fly the actual _1 transition. ARP and elev are official AIP Switzerland values. Pattern_direction inference: 14=left is standard; 32=right is City Circling per VAC text — both need real-VAC verification.
